summary: An important event hosted by Roton Corporation on Clancy Island, showcasing the mysterious "White Crystal" by CEO Zelen, draws VIPs, including Princess Rachel, and high-ranking heroes. Amidst high security and underlying suspicions about Leten Corporation's ethics, CEO Zelen begins his presentation, promising to reveal the crystal's true power. CUBE cadets, including Yoo Yeon-Ha and Kim Su-Ho, are present, as is Kim Ha-Jin acting as a security hero. As suspicious individuals are noted, Princess Rachel's security team becomes alert, anticipating an incident and ordering to locate Kim Ha-Jin.
key_moments: The Roton Corporation's event on Clancy Island commences, attended by Princess Rachel, high-ranking heroes, and CUBE cadets, to witness CEO Zelen's presentation of the White Crystal.
CEO Zelen begins his speech, introducing Mana and the White Crystal, promising to reveal how Leten Corporation will utilize its great power.
Observations are made about Kim Ha-Jin, who is present as a security hero, while concerns are raised about the integrity of Leten Corporation and the "White Crystal."
Princess Rachel's security team identifies suspicious individuals in the hall and initiates a search for Kim Ha-Jin, anticipating an unfolding incident.
